---
layout: cv
title: Jaye Colbert's CV
---
# Jaye Colbert
Accounting student at BYU-Idaho

<div id="webaddress">
<a href="col24015@byui.edu">jaye@byu.edu</a>
</div>


## Currently

Studying accounting at BYU-idaho

### Specialized in

Accounting cycle, financial statement, bookkeeping, cost accounting


## Education

`January 2024 - May 2024`
__Utah Valley University, Orem Utah__

`September 2024 - Present`
__BYU-Idaho, Rexburg, Idaho__


## Awards

`2017`
Eagle Scout



## Occupation

Full time student 

<!-- ### Footer

Last updated: April 2026 -->
